name: rabbit-cage
summary: Owns the entire Claude Code surface and all user-facing capabilities: hooks, commands, skills for scaffolding, project management, and installation. Bug-filing and backlog management are owned by the rabbit-file feature.
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes a native feature-container mechanism that subsumes this role
updated_note: the `updated` field is hand-maintained at the close of each TDD cycle; bump it whenever feature contents materially change
spec_no_change_reason: spec change committed pre-dispatch in 93f36696 (rabbit-feature-touch Step 3, Inv 16); see HEAD~1 diff
